title: cocktail pop-up at kava lova
headline: a *cocktail* pop-up, and where to drink after work.
descr: Simple plan: stop by after work, have a couple of cocktails, stay in your rhythm.
body:
a one-night **guest-bartender pop-up** at kava lova — vanya from qube bar behind the counter.

simple plan: *stop by after work, have a couple of cocktails, stay in your rhythm.* no tickets, no fuss.

**from 19:00 till late** · reserve via @kavalova.

title: oyster weekend at pure bistro
headline: oyster *weekend*, and the best brunch in town.
descr: Fresh oysters, cava and crémant in one of our favorite brunch & dinner spots in Batumi.
body:
**fresh oysters, cava and crémant** for one weekend at pure bistro — one of our favourite tables on the chavchavadze side.

*shuck, sip, repeat.* walk-ins are fine, but a table is safer on the saturday night.

**fri–sun · 08–10 may.**
